creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 254935
www/html2rss.patch

html2rss is a shell script designed to facilitate the conversion of
HTML web pages into RSS feeds. This tool is particularly useful for
users who want to keep track of updates on specific web pages that
do not provide an RSS feed natively.

WWW:    https://github.com/nxjosephofficial/html2rss

Thanks in advance.
